final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing detailed exploded-view illustration of a Sony A7 camera showing all its components.

Style/medium: needs a technical exploded-diagram aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be exploded/disassembled layout with all parts spread out and labeled
Subject: must include the Sony A7 camera fully disassembled into all its individual components with part names labeled
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include part/component names labeled on each piece (in Spanish)
Constraints: must preserve all major camera components visibly separated and clearly identified with labels
Avoid:
